2026-04-13T22:31:58.0719396Z [hash-debug] Starting hash computation for: .github/workflows/issue-triage.md
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1704422Z [hash-debug] File content length: 27521 bytes
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1709023Z [hash-debug] Frontmatter text (6521 chars):
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1709710Z ---
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1710188Z description: |
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1710867Z   Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1750106Z   Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1750933Z   predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1751716Z   analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1752503Z   Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1753014Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1753152Z on:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1753461Z   issues:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1753794Z     types: [opened]
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1754170Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1754537Z     inputs:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1754872Z       issue_number:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1755475Z         description: "Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)"
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1756189Z         required: true
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1756574Z         type: string
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1756997Z   roles: all
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1757375Z   reaction: eyes
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1757815Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1757998Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1758251Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1758407Z network:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1758731Z   allowed:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1759061Z     - defaults
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1759425Z     - "api.nuget.org"
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1759663Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1759818Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1760186Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1760617Z   add-labels:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1760942Z     max: 7
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1761272Z     target: "*"
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1761617Z   remove-labels:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1761957Z     max: 7
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1763178Z     target: "*"
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1765296Z   add-comment:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1765688Z     max: 2
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1766048Z     target: "*"
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1766430Z   assign-to-user:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1766822Z     max: 1
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1769749Z     target: "*"
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1770171Z   close-issue:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1770542Z     max: 1
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1770888Z     target: "*"
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1771254Z   noop:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1771633Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1772076Z   jobs:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1772424Z     mention_owners:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1773754Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1774904Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1775383Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1775907Z       permissions:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1776289Z         issues: write
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1776678Z       inputs:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1777050Z         message:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1777790Z           description: "The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols"
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1778464Z           required: true
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1778864Z           type: string
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1779246Z         owners:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1780087Z           description: "Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')"
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1781323Z           required: true
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1781744Z           type: string
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1782132Z       steps:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1782620Z         - name: Post mention comment
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1783116Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1783923Z           env:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1784477Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1785148Z           with:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1785504Z             script: |
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1785897Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1786462Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1786873Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1787071Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1826396Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1827263Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1828147Z                 }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1828704Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1829428Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1829970Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1830399Z                 }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1830759Z                 return null;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1831154Z               }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1831356Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1831582Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1832135Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1832672Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1833027Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1833211Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1834584Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1835922Z                 return;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1836297Z               }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1836503Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1836690Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1837262Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1851656Z                 try {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1852141Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1852779Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1853358Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1853855Z                   });
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1854307Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1854896Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1856167Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1857079Z                   });
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1857510Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1876276Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1876923Z                 }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1877320Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1878359Z               }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1878583Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1878754Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1879295Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1879846Z                 return;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1880235Z               }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1880631Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1881268Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1881887Z                 return;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1882267Z               }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1882476Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1882643Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1883267Z               try {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1883824Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1884586Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1885252Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1885916Z                 return;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1886296Z               }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1886500Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1886770Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1887432Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1888365Z                 return;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1888751Z               }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1888962Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1889322Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1890137Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1890739Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1891332Z                 return;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1891745Z               }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1891976Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1892155Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1892833Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1893644Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1894262Z                   return;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1894658Z                 }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1894865Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1895053Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1895561Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1896018Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1896478Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1896923Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1897428Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1900750Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1901506Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1902157Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1902632Z                   })
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1903017Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1903315Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1903500Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1904162Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1905149Z                   return;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1906575Z                 }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1906827Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1907040Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1907834Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1908417Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1908740Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1908895Z                 try {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1909339Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1909942Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1910444Z                     body
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1911189Z                   });
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1911888Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1912652Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1913308Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1913982Z                   return;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1914361Z                 }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1914698Z               }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1914899Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1915039Z tools:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1915364Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1915706Z   github:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1916037Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1917087Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1918034Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1918829Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1919400Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1919642Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1919808Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1920165Z ---

2026-04-13T22:31:58.1943675Z   jobs:

2026-04-13T22:31:58.1944913Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1945932Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1946394Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1946877Z       permissions:

2026-04-13T22:31:58.1953323Z           description: "Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')"
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1954791Z           required: true
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1955481Z           type: string
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1956282Z       steps:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1957004Z         - name: Post mention comment
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1958404Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1958867Z           env:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1959406Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1960060Z           with:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1960401Z             script: |
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1960793Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1961339Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1961753Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1961938Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1962644Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1963695Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1964486Z                 }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1965582Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1966602Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1967453Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1968414Z                 }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1968786Z                 return null;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1969187Z               }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1969390Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1969600Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1970166Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1970692Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1971026Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1971201Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1972556Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1974248Z                 return;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1974625Z               }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1974831Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1975021Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1975599Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1976135Z                 try {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1976568Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1977342Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1978088Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1978588Z                   });
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1979380Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1980537Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1982331Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1983766Z                   });
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1984476Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1985661Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1986583Z                 }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1987268Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1988287Z               }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1988507Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1988678Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1989203Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1989749Z                 return;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1990125Z               }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1990515Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1991148Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1991751Z                 return;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1992113Z               }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1992315Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1992483Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1992887Z               try {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1994206Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1995147Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1995938Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1996608Z                 return;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1996974Z               }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1997183Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1997449Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1998332Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1998878Z                 return;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1999250Z               }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1999449Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.1999817Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2000872Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2001465Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2002058Z                 return;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2002423Z               }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2002623Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2002800Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2003471Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2004316Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2004921Z                   return;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2005298Z                 }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2005510Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2006020Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2006524Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2006966Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2007431Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2008061Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2008559Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2009161Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2009835Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2010490Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2010946Z                   })
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2011681Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2012080Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2012269Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2012891Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2013505Z                   return;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2013888Z                 }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2014094Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2014267Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2014817Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2015391Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2015702Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2015851Z                 try {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2016304Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2017137Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2017864Z                     body
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2018249Z                   });
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2018915Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2019688Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2020343Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2021014Z                   return;
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2021395Z                 }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2021736Z               }
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2021950Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2022087Z tools:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2022410Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2022740Z   github:
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2023067Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2023563Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2024394Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2025087Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2025745Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2025999Z 
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2026152Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2026701Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2027354Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (6762 chars):
2026-04-13T22:31:58.2064649Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues\n  Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,\n  predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides\n  analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links\n  Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository\n\non:\n  issues:\n    types: [opened]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      issue_number:\n        description: \"Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)\"\n        required: true\n        type: string\n  roles: all\n  reaction: eyes\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork:\n  allowed:\n    - defaults\n    - \"api.nuget.org\"\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  add-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  remove-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  add-comment:\n    max: 2\n    target: \"*\"\n  assign-to-user:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  close-issue:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    mention_owners:\n      description: \"Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      output: \"Owner mention comment posted\"\n      permissions:\n        issues: write\n      inputs:\n        message:\n          description: \"The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n        owners:\n          description: \"Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n      steps:\n        - name: Post mention comment\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const fs = require('fs');\n              const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;\n\n              function resolveIssueNumber() {\n                if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {\n                  return context.issue.number;\n                }\n                const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);\n                if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {\n                  return parsed;\n                }\n                return null;\n              }\n\n              const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();\n              const owner = context.repo.owner;\n              const repo = context.repo.repo;\n\n              if (issueNumber === null) {\n                core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              async function failSafe(reason) {\n                core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.addLabels({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    labels: ['needs-team-triage']\n                  });\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'\n                  });\n                } catch (recoveryError) {\n                  core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);\n                }\n                core.setFailed(reason);\n              }\n\n              if (!outputFile) {\n                await failSafe('No agent output path provided');\n                return;\n              }\n              if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {\n                await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              let agentOutput;\n              try {\n                agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));\n              } catch (parseError) {\n                await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {\n                await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');\n              if (items.length === 0) {\n                await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              for (const item of items) {\n                if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {\n                  await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const mentions = item.owners\n                  .split(/[\\s,]+/)\n                  .map(s => s.trim())\n                  .filter(Boolean)\n                  .map(raw => {\n                    const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\\\?@/, '');\n                    if (/\\r|\\n/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    return `@${normalized}`;\n                  })\n                  .filter(Boolean);\n\n                if (mentions.length === 0) {\n                  await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const body = item.message\n                  ? `${item.message}\\n\\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`\n                  : mentions.join(' ');\n\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body\n                  });\n                  core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);\n                } catch (apiError) {\n                  await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);\n                  return;\n                }\n              }\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues]\n    # Triage must read issues from all users, including external\n    # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the\n    # auto-applied \"approved\" policy filters them out via DIFC\n    min-integrity: none\n\ntimeout-minutes: 10"}
